introLines: XRDB, eXtended Ratings DataBase, is a dynamic media artwork service with live ratings, badges, and proxy tooling.
XRDB publishes live configurator, export, reference, preview, proxy, and thumbnail surfaces from https://xrdb.ibbylabs.dev.

sections.heading: Primary XRDB routes and surfaces
lines: /: Configurator workspace for render settings and live preview.
/addon: Addon proxy workspace and manifest export flow.
/api/discord-widget: Community widget endpoint.
/api/latest-release: Latest release feed used by the site.
/api/media-resolve: Configurator media resolve endpoint.
/api/media-search: Configurator media search endpoint.
/docs-capture/mock-addon-manifest.json: Docs capture mock addon manifest endpoint.
/export: Export workspace for generated URLs and patterns.
/preview/[slug]: Fixed preview routes used by docs and live samples.
/proxy/[...path]: Proxy pass through endpoint for addon traffic.
/proxy/manifest.json: Proxy addon manifest endpoint.
/reference: Reference surface for shipped options and behavior.
/thumbnail/[id]/[episodeToken]: Episode thumbnail render route.

sections.heading: Recent XRDB feature highlights
lines: generate XRDB product context artifact
default doc refresh away from Turbopack
add timeout to playwright screenshot CLI to prevent infinite selector wait
BUG-55 make setup intro navigable on constrained mobile viewports
BUG-54 restore scroll containment export text mapping and ring rendering

sections.heading: Output and export capabilities
lines: Supported image outputs: poster, backdrop, logo, thumbnail.
Poster sizes: normal 580x859, large 1280x1896, 4k 2000x2926.
Backdrop sizes: normal 1280x720, large 1920x1080, 4k 3840x2160.
Artwork sources in route config: tmdb, fanart, cinemeta, omdb, random, blackbar.
Explicit input id sources: imdb, tmdb, tvdb, mal, kitsu, anilist, anidb.
AIOMetadata export patterns are generated from the configurator export flow.

sections.heading: Metadata and proxy behavior
lines: BYOK is the default runtime model. Provider keys come from configurator state or request URLs.
Configured base URLs: TMDB https://api.themoviedb.org/3, anime mapping https://animemapping.stremio.dpdns.org, Kitsu https://kitsu.io/api/edge, OMDb https://www.omdbapi.com.
Optional server side provider support exists for MyAnimeList, Trakt, SIMKL, Fanart, OMDb.
Proxy manifest requests require url, tmdbKey, and mdblistKey query params.
XRDB request keys can be supplied through xrdbKey, xrdb_key, x-xrdb-key, x-api-key, Authorization Bearer.
Proxy CORS allowlists are controlled by XRDB_PROXY_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.

sections.heading: Runtime and deployment notes
lines: Tagged releases run through the npm release scripts and the npm version lifecycle.
Tagged releases publish GitHub release notes and GHCR container images.
compose.yaml is the stack path and local-compose.yaml is the standalone local path.
Project support link: https://kofi.ibbylabs.dev.
